Active Grantees Contact Info Report does not work properly ;   ;  ;       This report should list all grantees with at least one active grant as of a selected run date. It does not. I've pinpointed a few of the problems:  ;   1) The report requires start date and end date as parameters, but it's not clear what should be entered. By experimentation I determined that the report will not include any grantee where the active grant’s ORIGINAL end date is earlier than the selected end date, even if the current end date is in the future. Furthermore, it needs to be determined whether for the Office of Communications' purposes an active grant is a grant whose status is approved, a grant that has not yet reached its end date, or a grant that has not yet been closed (for example, an expired grant with capital equipment reports pending).   2) The report also omits grants that do not have an end date -- consequently, Investees where the PRI has not yet closed, grantees with an equity grant associated with a PRI that has not yet closed, and grantees with grants awaiting government approval are omitted from the list.   It would probably be helpful to add an additional parameter: Country, with the option of choosing a single country, all countries, or a selection of countries.    ;   Reference Ticket : 607776   I would recommend checking with the Office of Communications regarding the priority to be assigned fixing this report. When they need it, it is usually right away or close to it.
